revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''乙丑'''（きのとうし、いつちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
甲子から数えて2番目で、前は[[甲子]]、次は[[丙寅]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==乙丑の年==
==乙丑の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.comment: Removed redirect to [[en:Wood Ox]]
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Kōshi|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Heiin|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]][[category:original pages]] * [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[ja:乙丑]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙丑''' (Kinoto-ushi, おつぼくのうし, Itchū) is one of the [[sexagenary cycle]] combinations.
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-ushi == Years in the [[Gregorian calendar]] that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 correspond to Kinoto-ushi years. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoto-ushi Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[5]] *[[65]] *[[125]] *[[185]] *[[245]] *[[305]] *[[365]] *[[425]] *[[485]] *[[545]] *[[605]] *[[665]] *[[725]] *[[785]] *[[845]] *[[905]] *[[965]] | *[[1025]] *[[1085]] *[[1145]] *[[1205]] *[[1265]] *[[1325]] *[[1385]] *[[1445]] *[[1505]] *[[1565]] *[[1625]] *[[1685]] *[[1745]] *[[1805]] *[[1865]] *[[1925]] *[[1985]] | *[[2045]] *[[2105]] *[[2165]] *[[2225]] *[[2285]] *[[2345]] *[[2405]] *[[2465]] *[[2525]] *[[2585]] *[[2645]] *[[2705]] *[[2765]] *[[2825]] *[[2885]] *[[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-ushi == In Gregorian years ending with the digits 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stem]] is [[癸]] or [[戊]]), the [[12th month]] is Kinoto-ushi. However, in the context of the [[lunar calendar]], it may also refer to the lunar month or the [[solar term]] period between [[Shōkan]] (Lesser Cold) and the day before [[Risshun]] (Beginning of Spring).
== Days of Kinoto-ushi == === Calendar Notes === Kinoto-ushi days have the following [[Calendar Notes]]: * [[Kyū-kai-nichi]] (凶会日) - applicable to the 3rd and 10th months of the [[lunar calendar]]. * [[Go-mu-nichi]] (五墓日) - for individuals with a [[Nayin]] element of wood. * [[Shinkichi-nichi]] (神吉日) - auspicious for divine matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[ja:乙丑]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙丑''' (Kinoto-ushi, おつぼくのうし, Itchū) is one of the [[sexagenary cycle]] combinations.
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-ushi == Years in the [[Gregorian calendar]] that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 correspond to Kinoto-ushi years. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kinoto-ushi Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[5]] *[[65]] *[[125]] *[[185]] *[[245]] *[[305]] *[[365]] *[[425]] *[[485]] *[[545]] *[[605]] *[[665]] *[[725]] *[[785]] *[[845]] *[[905]] *[[965]] | *[[1025]] *[[1085]] *[[1145]] *[[1205]] *[[1265]] *[[1325]] *[[1385]] *[[1445]] *[[1505]] *[[1565]] *[[1625]] *[[1685]] *[[1745]] *[[1805]] *[[1865]] *[[1925]] *[[1985]] | *[[2045]] *[[2105]] *[[2165]] *[[2225]] *[[2285]] *[[2345]] *[[2405]] *[[2465]] *[[2525]] *[[2585]] *[[2645]] *[[2705]] *[[2765]] *[[2825]] *[[2885]] *[[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-ushi == In Gregorian years ending with the digits 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stem]] is [[癸]] or [[戊]]), the [[12th month]] is Kinoto-ushi. However, in the context of the [[lunar calendar]], it may also refer to the lunar month or the [[solar term]] period between [[Shōkan]] (Lesser Cold) and the day before [[Risshun]] (Beginning of Spring).
== Days of Kinoto-ushi == === Calendar Notes === Kinoto-ushi days have the following [[Calendar Notes]]: * [[Kyū-kai-nichi]] (凶会日) - applicable to the 3rd and 10th months of the [[lunar calendar]]. * [[Go-mu-nichi]] (五墓日) - for individuals with a [[Nayin]] element of wood. * [[Shinkichi-nichi]] (神吉日) - auspicious for divine matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:bump 1-20]] [[ja:乙丑]]

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Kōshi|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Heiin|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] * [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.

According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).

In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).

== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox-qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.

In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox-qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== Related Topics ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox-qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox-qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox-qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Ox—>[[category:qq close]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Tier 2]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:C]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:C]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:C]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 2]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

[[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[sn:in Wood Ox]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]] [[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Büffelen]][[en:Wood Ox]][[fr:Buffle de boishak]][[it:Yit-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichouja]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Büffelvi]][[vi:Ất Sửuza]][[za:Ietceij]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] <!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also! ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Five Elements Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] <!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

<!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[Category:11]] [[sn:in Wood Ox]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[de:Holz-Büffel]] [[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Büffelen]][[en:Wood Ox]][[fr:Buffle de boishak]][[it:Yit-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichouja]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Büffelvi]][[vi:Ất Sửuza]][[za:Ietceij]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Tier 5]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|ja|甲子}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}乙 represents Yin Wood, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest}} (Wood conquers Earth).
It is the second in the cycle, preceded by [[甲子]] (Kinoe-ne) and followed by [[丙寅]] (Hinoe-tora). In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stem]] [[乙]] represents the yin aspect of [[Wood]], while the [[Earthly Branch]] [[丑]] represents the yin aspect of [[Earth]]. This results in a [[Mutual Conquest]] relationship ([[Wood Conquers Earth]]).
== Years of Kinoto-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[5]] * [[65]] * [[125]] * [[185]] * [[245]] * [[305]] * [[365]] * [[425]] {{citation needed|Wood Ox}} [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category:Tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]] <!--Yin Wood Ox-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Ox]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Ox}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Wood Ox]]* [[485]] * [[545]] * [[605]] * [[665]] * [[725]] * [[785]] * [[845]] * [[905]] * [[965]] | * [[1025]] * [[1085]] * [[1145]] * [[1205]] * [[1265]] * [[1325]] * [[1385]] * [[1445]] * [[1505]] * [[1565]] * [[1625]] * [[1685]] * [[1745]] * [[1805]] * [[1865]] * [[1925]] * [[1985]] | * [[2045]] * [[2105]] * [[2165]] * [[2225]] * [[2285]] * [[2345]] * [[2405]] * [[2465]] * [[2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[2945]] |}
== Months of Kinoto-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Days of Kinoto-Ushi == === Calendar Annotations === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
