revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh_min_nan:It-thiú]][[zh_yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh_yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|qq=|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q599762]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[:en:yin|yin]] {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: itchū ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:5|5]] * [[:en:65|65]] * [[:en:125|125]] * [[:en:185|185]] * [[:en:245|245]] * [[:en:305|305]] * [[:en:365|365]] * [[:en:425|425]]
* [[:en:485|485]] * [[:en:545|545]] * [[:en:605|605]] * [[:en:665|665]] * [[:en:725|725]] * [[:en:785|785]] * [[:en:845|845]] * [[:en:905|905]] * [[:en:965|965]] | * [[:en:1025|1025]] * [[:en:1085|1085]] * [[:en:1145|1145]] * [[:en:1205|1205]] * [[:en:1265|1265]] * [[:en:1325|1325]] * [[:en:1385|1385]] * [[:en:1445|1445]] * [[:en:1505|1505]] * [[:en:1565|1565]] * [[:en:1625|1625]] * [[:en:1685|1685]] * [[:en:1745|1745]] * [[:en:1805|1805]] * [[:en:1865|1865]] * [[:en:1925|1925]] * [[:en:1985|1985]] | * [[:en:2045|2045]] * [[:en:2105|2105]] * [[:en:2165|2165]] * [[:en:2225|2225]] * [[:en:2285|2285]] * [[:en:2345|2345]] * [[:en:2405|2405]] * [[:en:2465|2465]] * [[:en:2525|2525]] * [[2585]] * [[2645]] * [[2705]] * [[2765]] * [[2825]] * [[2885]] * [[:en:2945|2945]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Wood Ox== === Rekichū === Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}: * {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months. * {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element. * {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
